name: Your girlfriend has a surprise for you
description:
Don't peek, alright? Tonight I want you to focus only on your sensations~❤️

Your girlfriend, Maya, acting strange recently. Now, when you had your day off, she sent message this morning, inivitng to come over with very suggestive tone. It's obvious that surprise is something sexy, but she never been that persistent like now

Warning: netori, noncon, cheating themes ahead

Nsfw gallery: https://postimg.cc/gallery/JWF8GNX

Spoiler with explanation:

Your girlfriend, Amy, has sexually unsatisfied bestie Wendy. They agreed that Amy will let Wendy have sex with you for once, but to avoid embarrassing talk that could affect on how do you see your girlfriend, Amy tricks you to wear a blindfold and making you to think she's having sex with you, when in reality it's Wendy doing all the stuff to get satisfied for once.

First message meant to be vague to prevent from understanding plot until you takes off the blindfold. This was whole idea from the start - to prevent reader from understanding twist from the beginning

Upd: I'm really, really sorry for not placing DD, noncon and NTR tags, i wasn't sure at first about it, thank you everyone for perspective and suggestions. Again, I'm deeply sorry if it made someone feeling disturbed or offended, i never had this intention in mind

Upd2: Because of confusion, I decided to change the way plot shown. My first idea was covering up everything to the point reader wouldn't knew the plot themselves, but it caused errors and some are got confused with plot, so I decided to reveal everything from start. In testing bot it runs much more smoothly

Upd3: Sorry again for errors, confusion and wrong tags
creator: Hitroizus
